seo.title: SmartPlay HK OSS | LCSD Sports Facility Availability Checker
seo.description: SmartPlay HK OSS is an open-source, community-driven tool for checking LCSD sports facility availability in Hong Kong. Monitor real-time availability for tennis, basketball, and more.
seo.ogTitle: SmartPlay HK OSS - Community LCSD Availability Checker
seo.ogDescription: Fast, clean, and open-source alternative for checking Hong Kong LCSD facility availability. Get real-time updates and notifications.

hero.title: SmartPlay HK OSS
hero.subtitle: Community-Driven Availability Checker
hero.description: A faster, cleaner, and open-source alternative to check LCSD facility availability. Real-time monitoring and advanced filtering.

booking.title: Venue Search
booking.description: Instantly scan real-time availability for tennis courts, basketball courts, and more across all districts. No more manual region switching—see all open slots in one unified view.

activity.title: Activity
activity.description: Monitor quotas and enrollment status for sports courses and tournaments. A centralized hub to keep track of upcoming programs and their remaining slots.

scheduler.title: Watcher Scheduler
scheduler.description: Automate your facility checks. Set up custom 'Watchers' for your favorite venues and times, and receive instant alerts via Webhook (Discord/Slack) as soon as a slot becomes available.

disclaimer: Note: This is an unofficial open-source tool. All bookings must be completed via the official LCSD SmartPlay website.
